mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.name, COUNT(DISTINCT room_member.user_id) AS "memberCount", latest_message.content AS "lastMessage", latest_message.created_at AS "lastMessageAt", CAST(0 AS BIGINT) AS "unreadCount" FROM chat_room_members my_room JOIN chat_rooms cr ON cr.id = my_room.chat_room_id JOIN chat_room_members room_member ON room_member.chat_room_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT cm.content, cm.created_at FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.chat_room_id = cr.id ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC, cm.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_message ON TRUE WHERE my_room.user_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY cr.id, cr.name, latest_message.content, latest_message.created_at ORDER BY latest_message.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, cr.id DESC
